soundInsulation.title: Sound Insulation Performance
soundInsulation.description: DECA windows achieve STC ratings of 42-50 dB — reducing highway noise, aircraft, and urban traffic to comfortable background levels. Our triple-glazed systems outperform standard windows by 50-80%.
